Members Platform

AI Playbooks.
Pre-Built for Your Business.

Stop figuring out AI from scratch. These playbooks are built by Neural Horizons AI for mid-size businesses in UAE and MENA — covering every critical area from sales pipeline automation to full AI process transformation.

⚡ Sales & Marketing AI 🔄 AI Business Processes View Plans
18+
AI Playbooks
3
Category Bundles
UAE/MENA
Market-Specific
24hr
Access After Audit
Bundle 1

Sales & Marketing AI Playbooks

Every tool your revenue team needs — from qualifying leads intelligently to closing the loop between marketing spend and revenue generated.

Bundle Price
AED 365/mo
or AED 70 per playbook
🎯
Playbook 01

Lead Scoring AI Playbook

Stop wasting sales time on cold leads. Build an AI-powered lead scoring system that ranks every prospect by fit, intent, and readiness — so your team only works leads worth working.

✓Lead tier classification (Hot / Warm / Cold)
✓Scoring criteria matrix (fit + intent + timing)
✓CRM integration guide (HubSpot / Salesforce)
✓Zonar OS™ lead routing rules
AED 70 Get Access →
🔍
Playbook 02

Funnel Diagnostic Playbook

Find exactly where your pipeline is leaking revenue. Map each conversion stage, identify the highest-impact fix, and prioritise what to automate first for maximum ROI.

✓Stage-by-stage conversion rate analysis
✓Revenue leak calculator (input your numbers)
✓Fix-priority matrix (effort vs revenue impact)
✓Automation opportunity map
AED 70 Get Access →
🤝
Playbook 03

MQL-to-SQL Handoff Playbook

End the war between sales and marketing. Define exactly when a lead becomes sales-ready, automate the handoff, and eliminate the leads that fall through the gap.

✓MQL definition criteria builder
✓Automated handoff SOP (checklist + triggers)
✓SLA agreement template (marketing ↔ sales)
✓Rejection + recycle loop setup
AED 70 Get Access →
📅
Playbook 04

90-Day AI Strategy Playbook

A structured 90-day rollout for AI across your revenue function — with specific milestones, KPIs, and team actions for each phase. Built for implementation, not just reading.

✓Days 1–30: Foundation (data, tools, alignment)
✓Days 31–60: Acceleration (automate + connect)
✓Days 61–90: Scale (measure, optimise, expand)
✓Weekly accountability tracker
AED 70 Get Access →
📊
Playbook 05

Campaign ROI & Attribution Playbook

Know exactly which campaigns generate revenue — not just leads. Implement multi-touch attribution, build your ROI dashboard, and stop spending on channels that don't convert.

✓Attribution model selection guide
✓Campaign ROI calculator (spend → revenue)
✓KPI dashboard setup (pipeline value, CAC, ROAS)
✓Budget reallocation decision framework
AED 70 Get Access →
✍️
Playbook 06

AI Content Engine Playbook

Build a content system that generates qualified inbound leads. Use AI to research, create, distribute and repurpose content across channels — without a full marketing team.

✓AI content brief template (ICP-aligned)
✓LinkedIn thought leadership system
✓Repurposing workflow (1 post → 6 assets)
✓SEO + AI search optimisation checklist
AED 70 Get Access →

Access every Sales & Marketing AI playbook. Includes the interactive platform + Zonar OS™ integration guides.
AED 365/mo
Cancel anytime
Get Bundle →
Bundle 2

AI Business Process Playbooks

Redesign how your business operates — from hiring and onboarding to customer service and finance. Each playbook rebuilds a critical process around AI and agentic automation.

Bundle Price
AED 365/mo
or AED 70 per playbook
🧭
Playbook 07

AI Readiness Assessment

Know exactly where your business sits on the AI maturity curve — and what you need to fix before you can scale AI effectively. Foundation, Growth, or Advanced: the path is clear.

✓10-point readiness scorecard
✓Data infrastructure gap analysis
✓Team capability mapping
✓Personalised AI roadmap by tier
AED 70 Get Access →
⚙️
Playbook 08

Workflow Automation Playbook

Identify, map, and automate your highest-volume manual processes. Prioritise by ROI, design the new workflow, and implement with the right tools — without disrupting operations.

✓Process audit framework (time × volume × cost)
✓Automation opportunity scoring matrix
✓Tool selection guide (Zapier / Make / n8n / Zonar™)
✓Change management & rollout checklist
AED 70 Get Access →
👥
Playbook 09

AI Hiring & Onboarding Playbook

Cut time-to-hire by 40% and ramp new hires faster. Use AI to screen, score and shortlist candidates — then automate onboarding so every new employee gets the same high-quality start.

✓AI candidate screening criteria framework
✓Interview question bank (role + culture fit)
✓30/60/90-day onboarding automation plan
✓AI knowledge base setup for new hires
AED 70 Get Access →
💬
Playbook 10

Customer Service AI Playbook

Resolve 60%+ of customer enquiries without human intervention — while improving satisfaction scores. Build an AI-first support system that escalates intelligently when humans are genuinely needed.

✓Ticket triage + AI routing framework
✓AI chatbot knowledge base structure
✓Escalation triggers + human handoff SOP
✓CSAT + resolution rate measurement dashboard
AED 70 Get Access →
🔐
Playbook 11

Data Governance Playbook

You can't run AI on bad data. Build the governance foundation — data ownership, quality standards, access controls, and compliance — so every AI system you deploy runs on clean, trusted data.

✓Data ownership map (who owns what)
✓Data quality audit checklist
✓GDPR / UAE PDPL compliance guide
✓Data readiness score for AI deployment
AED 70 Get Access →
🛠️
Playbook 12

AI Tool Stack Builder Playbook

Stop buying AI tools that don't connect. Build a coherent AI stack aligned to your goals, budget, and team size — with clear integration paths and a total cost of ownership model.

✓Goal-to-tool mapping framework
✓30+ AI tools reviewed (UAE market focus)
✓Stack consolidation + overlap audit
✓Integration architecture diagram template
AED 70 Get Access →

Full access to every Business Process AI playbook. Includes the interactive tools + Zonar OS™ integration guides.

Interactive Playbook Platform
